---
title: "Weekly Journal Entry"
subtitle: "Week 15"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
params:
  week: 15
  chapters: "Ch 21: The Portfolio and Ch 22: Going Live"
  approach: "connector"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: false
    colorlinks: true
---

## Journal Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Week** | 15 |
| **Reading** | Ch 21: The Portfolio and Ch 22: Going Live |
| **Approach** | Connector / Troubleshooter / Critic (choose one) |

---

## Instructions

Reflect on this week's reading and coursework. Write 250-300 words using one of three approaches:

- **The Connector**: Link this week's material to something bigger --- your project, a previous concept, real-world media, or your own experience
- **The Troubleshooter**: Document a challenge you faced this week and how you worked through it
- **The Critic**: Ask a critical question about this week's material. Challenge an assumption or explore an implication.

Delete the two approaches you are NOT using. Write your reflection below.

---

## My Reflection

[Write 250-300 words here]

---

**Push to GitHub** after writing, then submit the rendered PDF to Blackboard.
